concerns.text: The idea notes that the OQMD magnetic CSV does NOT contain a `curie_temperature` column, yet FR-002 simply states “System MUST ingest the Open Quantum Materials Database (OQMD) magnetic CSV release and merge it with the Materials Project data” without specifying how missing `curie_temperature` values will be handled. This silently redefines the research question by assuming both targets are available from OQMD, which may invalidate the intended analysis.

FR-011 adds a hard runtime constraint (complete pipeline within a single 6‑hour GitHub Actions job on the free‑tier runner). The original idea did not impose any such performance budget, so this introduces an unnecessary engineering limitation that was not part of the research scope.
